title: Nami Looks for Sky Island Clues
description: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: T-this is very troubling for me!

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Hey, can I kick his ass?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You think you can kick my ass....!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Here, get yourself something decent to wear.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Sarquiss! The money's wasted on them.

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Really? You're giving it to me?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Come on! We're leaving this lousy place!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! What a bunch of losers!

summary: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
